summary: Test suite is critically incomplete. Fixture files (run1-ubuntu.xml, run2-macos.xml, run3-windows.json) are referenced but creation code is missing—tests will fail immediately. No unit tests for individual parsing functions (Parse-JUnitXml, Parse-JsonResults, Find-FlakyTests, New-MarkdownSummary). Testing strategy is act-only (no local unit tests), making debugging difficult. Only 2 happy-path scenarios tested; zero coverage of error handling, malformed input, edge cases (empty suites, all-skipped, zero duration), or boundary conditions. Task requires TDD (write failing test first), but no evidence of test-first development. Fixture data is described in comments but not instantiated. Tests would not pass as written due to missing fixture files.
